[公开资料未明确] 公开资料未明确声明该要素；这是 OpenODC 用于度量公开资料缺口的价值点。
[结构性类别] 详见下级元素
[公开资料未明确] 小鹏官方页面和配置表未公开 XNGP 统一运行速度上限；实际目标车速受道路限速、功能策略、驾驶员设置和车机提示约束。
[公开资料未明确] 小鹏官方页面披露 AEB/AES 等主动安全速度能力和 XNGP 功能配置，但未公开 XNGP 统一启用/运行速度阈值；AEB/AES 130 km/h 不应替代 XNGP ODC。
[公开资料未明确] 公开资料未明确声明该要素；这是 OpenODC 用于度量公开资料缺口的价值点。
[公开资料未明确] 公开资料未明确声明该要素；这是 OpenODC 用于度量公开资料缺口的价值点。
[公开资料未明确] 公开资料未明确声明该要素；这是 OpenODC 用于度量公开资料缺口的价值点。
[公开资料未明确] 公开资料未明确声明该要素；这是 OpenODC 用于度量公开资料缺口的价值点。

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 城区 NGP + 施工绕行 / 复杂路口
boundary_combinations.title_en: Urban NGP + construction detour / complex intersection
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 城市 NGP 能力与施工标志、路障摆放、复杂路口和人车混行叠加时，公开资料没有给出稳定阈值。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: When urban NGP capability meets construction signs, irregular barriers, complex intersections, and mixed traffic, public sources do not provide stable thresholds.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 小鹏官方社区指南提示施工场景对感知要求高，该接管时就接管。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: XPeng’s official community guide says construction scenarios place high demands on perception and drivers should take over when needed.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 城市 NGP 不等于所有施工和复杂路口都能稳健处理。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Urban NGP does not mean every construction scene or complex intersection is robustly handled.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 适合从能力展示场景拆成施工 / 路口组合边界。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Useful for separating capability demos from construction / intersection boundary combinations.

evidence_refs.title: XNGP 快速上手指南（小鹏官方社区）
evidence_refs.section: 使用准备、新手任务、退出方式、接管注意场景

evidence_refs.title: 2026 款小鹏 P7+ 产品页
evidence_refs.section: 第二代 VLA、主动安全和辅助驾驶免责声明

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 天气受限 + 标线退化阈值未公开
boundary_combinations.title_en: Weather limitation + undisclosed lane-marking degradation threshold
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 官网免责声明说明辅助驾驶无法应对所有交通、天气和路况；但未给出雨雪雾、标线退化的量化边界。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: The product disclaimer states assisted driving cannot handle all traffic, weather, and road conditions, but does not quantify rain, snow, fog, or lane-marking degradation boundaries.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 公开资料不足以判断天气和标线退化组合下的系统退出阈值。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Public sources are insufficient to determine system-exit thresholds under combined weather and marking degradation.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 天气和标线同时退化时，应理解为公开缺口。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Combined weather and marking degradation should be treated as a public disclosure gap.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 需要厂家手册或车机提示补充阈值。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Requires vendor manual or in-vehicle prompt thresholds.

evidence_refs.title: 2026 款小鹏 P7+ 产品页
evidence_refs.section: 第二代 VLA、主动安全和辅助驾驶免责声明

evidence_refs.title: XNGP 快速上手指南（小鹏官方社区）
evidence_refs.section: 使用准备、新手任务、退出方式、接管注意场景

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 主动安全速度能力 + XNGP 运行速度边界
boundary_combinations.title_en: Active-safety speed capability + XNGP operating-speed boundary
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: AEB / AES 的 130 km/h 公开能力不能外推为 XNGP 的统一运行速度边界。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Public 130 km/h AEB / AES capability cannot be generalized into a unified XNGP operating-speed boundary.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 官网披露主动安全速度能力，但没有披露 XNGP 统一运行速度 ODC。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The product page discloses active-safety speed capability, but not a unified XNGP operating-speed ODC.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 主动安全速度和导航辅助驾驶速度是两类不同边界。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Active-safety speed and navigation-assisted-driving speed are different boundaries.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 防止把主动安全宣传参数误填为 XNGP ODC。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Prevents active-safety marketing parameters from being copied into XNGP ODC.

evidence_refs.title: 2026 款小鹏 P7+ 产品页
evidence_refs.section: 第二代 VLA、主动安全和辅助驾驶免责声明

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 安全考试 / 新手任务 + 驾驶员持续监管
boundary_combinations.title_en: Safety exam / novice task + continuous driver supervision
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: XNGP 开启前需要完成安全考试；初次使用存在新手任务，驾驶员仍需手握方向盘、注意路况、及时接管。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: XNGP requires a safety exam before use; initial use includes novice tasks, and the driver must keep hands on the wheel, monitor the road, and take over in time.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 小鹏官方社区指南明确写明安全考试、新手任务和驾驶员接管责任。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: XPeng’s official community guide states the safety exam, novice task, and driver takeover responsibility.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: XNGP 的边界包括使用者状态，不只是车辆能力。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: XNGP boundaries include user state, not just vehicle capability.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: L2+ ODC 应强制包含驾驶员状态与 HMI 条件。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: L2+ ODC should require driver-state and HMI conditions.

evidence_refs.title: XNGP 快速上手指南（小鹏官方社区）
evidence_refs.section: 使用准备、新手任务、退出方式、接管注意场景

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 复杂路口 / 人车混行 + 鬼探头
boundary_combinations.title_en: Complex intersection / mixed traffic + sudden pedestrian or vehicle emergence
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 复杂路口、人车混行和遮挡后突然出现目标叠加时，即便系统具备一定应对能力，仍要求驾驶员准备接管。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: At complex intersections with mixed traffic and sudden emergence behind occlusion, the driver must remain ready to take over even if the system can handle some cases.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 官方指南将“车辆 / 行人鬼探头”“复杂路口、人车混行”列为需要保持警惕并随时接管的场景。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The official guide lists sudden vehicle / pedestrian emergence and complex mixed-traffic intersections as scenarios requiring alertness and takeover readiness.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 鬼探头是组合触发条件，不是单一“行人”要素。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Sudden emergence is a combined trigger condition, not a single “pedestrian” element.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 应与 ROAM 的城市交叉口异常和 DRIVEResearch 的遮挡目标分布联动。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Should link with ROAM urban-intersection anomalies and DRIVEResearch occluded-target distributions.

evidence_refs.title: XNGP 快速上手指南（小鹏官方社区）
evidence_refs.section: 使用准备、新手任务、退出方式、接管注意场景

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 旁车紧急加塞 + 主辅路切换 / 车道汇流
boundary_combinations.title_en: Emergency cut-in + main-side-road transition / lane merge
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 紧急加塞、主辅路切换和汇流场景把侧向目标预测、速度差和路径规划绑定在一起。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Emergency cut-ins, main-side-road transitions, and merges bind lateral target prediction, speed differential, and route planning together.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 官方指南提示旁车紧急加塞、主辅路切换和车道汇流场景仍需用户认真监督并随时准备接管。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The official guide says emergency cut-ins, main-side-road transitions, and merges still require serious supervision and takeover readiness.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 变道能力不等于所有加塞和汇流都能稳定处理。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Lane-change capability does not mean every cut-in and merge is robustly handled.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 适合转化为横向交互组合边界。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Suitable as a lateral-interaction boundary combination.

evidence_refs.title: XNGP 快速上手指南（小鹏官方社区）
evidence_refs.section: 使用准备、新手任务、退出方式、接管注意场景

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 小路场景 + 突发情况种类多
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 小路通常伴随窄车道、非机动车、行人、临停车辆和遮挡；它不是一个单独道路类型就能表达的边界。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Small roads usually involve narrow lanes, non-motorized vehicles, pedestrians, parked vehicles, and occlusion; they are not expressible as a single road type.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 官方指南称小路场景突发情况种类很多，需要注意安全。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The official guide states that small-road scenarios contain many types of unexpected events and require caution.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: “小路丝滑”应与小路突发风险同时展示。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: “Smooth on small roads” should be displayed together with small-road sudden-risk boundaries.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 建议作为 OpenODC 的消费者视图重点边界。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Recommended as a prominent consumer-view boundary.

evidence_refs.title: XNGP 快速上手指南（小鹏官方社区）
evidence_refs.section: 使用准备、新手任务、退出方式、接管注意场景

evidence_refs.title: 2026 款小鹏 P7+ 产品页
evidence_refs.section: 第二代 VLA、主动安全和辅助驾驶免责声明

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 导航目的地 + 档杆两次拨动 + 功能可用状态
boundary_combinations.title_en: Navigation destination + double stalk action + feature availability state
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: XNGP 的激活需要导航目的地、车辆状态满足条件和用户执行明确 HMI 操作。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: XNGP activation requires a navigation destination, eligible vehicle state, and explicit HMI operation.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 官方指南写明设置导航目的地、仪表显示可用图标后，连续向下拨动档杆两次开启。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The official guide states that a navigation destination is required and the driver activates the feature by double-stalking after the availability icon appears.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: XNGP 可用性是导航、车辆状态和用户操作的组合条件。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: XNGP availability is a combined condition of navigation, vehicle state, and user operation.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 该组合可指导 Workbench 从手册中抽取激活条件。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Useful for Workbench extraction of activation conditions from manuals.

evidence_refs.title: XNGP 快速上手指南（小鹏官方社区）
evidence_refs.section: 使用准备、新手任务、退出方式、接管注意场景

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 不限城市 / 不限路线表述 + 街道级边界缺口
boundary_combinations.title_en: “No city / route limitation” claim + street-level boundary gap
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: “不限城市、不限路线、不限路况”是公开能力表述，但没有给出道路级 ODC 列表、版本边界和不可用规则。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: “No city, route, or road-condition limitation” is a public capability statement, but it does not provide road-level ODC lists, version boundaries, or unavailability rules.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 小鹏官方社区指南有全国覆盖表述，同时强调 XNGP 仍是辅助驾驶，需要驾驶员接管。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: XPeng’s official community guide uses nationwide coverage language while emphasizing XNGP remains assisted driving and requires driver takeover.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 全国覆盖不应被误读为所有道路条件都明确公开。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Nationwide coverage should not be misread as every road condition being publicly specified.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 与华为样例类似，应保留覆盖表述与可机读 ODC 之间的差距。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Similar to the Huawei sample, preserve the gap between coverage language and machine-readable ODC.

evidence_refs.title: XNGP 快速上手指南（小鹏官方社区）
evidence_refs.section: 使用准备、新手任务、退出方式、接管注意场景

evidence_refs.title: 2026 款小鹏 P7+ 产品页
evidence_refs.section: 第二代 VLA、主动安全和辅助驾驶免责声明

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 第二代 VLA / Robotaxi 测试 + 量产 XNGP ODC 不等同
boundary_combinations.title_en: Second-generation VLA / Robotaxi testing + production XNGP ODC not equivalent
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 第二代 VLA 面向 L4 Robotaxi 的能力演进与量产 P7+ 上的 L2+ XNGP 公开 ODC 不能直接等同。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Second-generation VLA’s L4 Robotaxi capability evolution is not directly equivalent to the public ODC of production P7+ L2+ XNGP.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 发布会新闻稿说明第二代 VLA 正在训练更多 L4 能力，Robotaxi 通过场地测试；这不是量产车 ODC 声明。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The launch release states second-generation VLA is training more L4 capabilities and Robotaxi passed proving-ground testing; this is not a production-car ODC declaration.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: Robotaxi 技术路线不能直接当成消费者辅助驾驶边界。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Robotaxi technology roadmap should not be copied as consumer assisted-driving boundary.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 用于防止把技术路线宣传误填为产品 ODC。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Prevents technology-roadmap claims from being entered as product ODC.

evidence_refs.title: 2026 小鹏全球新品发布会新闻稿
evidence_refs.section: 第二代 VLA、Robotaxi 测试、P7+ 智驾和主动安全公开说明

sources: 2026 款小鹏 P7+ 产品页: https://www.xiaopeng.com/p7_plus_2026.html
2026 款小鹏 P7+ 参数配置表: https://www.xiaopeng.com/p7_plus_2026/configuration.html
2026 小鹏全球新品发布会新闻稿: https://www.xiaopeng.com/news/company_news/5529.html
小鹏图灵 AI 芯片页: https://www.xiaopeng.com/turingaichip.html
XNGP 快速上手指南（小鹏官方社区）: https://bbs.xiaopeng.com/article/2834581
G6 高速 NGP 上手指南（小鹏官方社区）: https://bbs.xiaopeng.com/article/1799825
metadata.notes: OpenODC 社区已按 2026-05-13 可访问的小鹏 P7+ 官方产品页、配置表、官方新闻稿和官方社区指南复核。本条为 L2 辅助驾驶样例。官方页面可支撑 P7+ AI 辅助驾驶硬件、城市/高速 NGP、车位到车位、人机共驾、AEB/AES 130 km/h 等主动安全参数和驾驶员责任提示；公开资料未给出 XNGP 统一运行速度上限、雨量/能见度/坡度等量化 ODC 阈值。
